agent_context: Assistant that helps an engineer operate a service.

seed_book.content: Always announce the deploy in the channel.

interactions.content: We shipped on a Friday afternoon and the team was gone when it broke.
Noted. Avoid Friday-afternoon deploys so someone is around if it breaks.

gold_end_state: one deploy skill holding both the announce do-rule and the Friday-avoid rule

agent_context: Assistant answering an end user's questions.

interactions.content: Stop answering immediately. Do not answer immediately; ask a clarifying question first.
Understood. I will ask a clarifying question before answering.

gold.extraction_signal: opposing advice on the same trigger

gold_end_state: two rules under refined distinct triggers, not merged

agent_context: Assistant that drives a multi-step task runner.

interactions.content: Use a dark theme for the dashboard from now on.
Recommend defaulting the dashboard to dark theme.
The payment step failed and the auto-retry ran it again, so we double-committed the charge.
Do not auto-retry like that. That caused a duplicate charge and I had to refund it.

gold_end_state: the auto-retry rule narrowed or rewritten to avoid the double-commit
